V0903_01_00_00_0.text: I'm the President of UTS, Yuamu Ohdo!

V0903_01_00_01_0.text: Let's settle this in a Rush Duel!

V0903_01_00_02_0.text: It's my responsibility to do what I have to do!

V0903_01_00_03_0.text: If I win, you have to work for me for free!

V0903_01_00_04_0.text: If you're not backing down, neither will I!

V0903_01_00_05_0.text: This is one Duel that I refuse to lose!

V0903_01_00_06_0.text: We do take on a lot of jobs, but we don't accept 'em all.

V0903_01_00_07_0.text: I'll teach you everything you need to know about Rush Duels!

V0903_01_00_08_0.text: You agreed to Rush Duel me, remember Yudias?

V0903_01_00_09_0.text: If you're scared, you'll never get that promotion you want.

V0903_01_00_11_0.text: I’ll remind you that your roots are here in this town!

V0903_01_00_12_0.text: If you Duel me, you might get info you know nothing about.

V0903_01_00_13_0.text: I'll snag every collectible your shop has available!

V0903_01_00_14_0.text: You sure love to Rush Duel, Damamu!

V0903_03_00_00_0.text: I won't give you a chance to counterattack!

V0903_03_00_01_0.text: I can't let up when the stakes are this high!

V0903_03_00_05_0.text: You've stepped up your game, so I have to raise mine too!

V0903_05_00_00_0.text: If I don’t know what’ll happen - anything can happen!

V0903_07_09_00_0.text: I'm going to use the card I Set!

V0903_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0903_16_00_01_0.text: I have everything I need to win!

V0903_21_00_00_0.text: I bet you didn't think you'd be in this much trouble.

V0903_21_00_01_0.text: You're lucky to still be in this.

V0903_21_00_04_0.text: I don't have the right cards to win yet...

V0903_21_00_05_0.text: You haven't done anything to surprise me so far.

V0903_28_00_00_0.text: If there's anything we can do for you, just call UTS!

V0903_28_00_01_0.text: My Hi-Tech Dragon Deck has state-of-the-art strategies!

V0903_28_00_02_0.text: Check this job off the list!

V0903_28_00_03_0.text:
You never know what'll happen in a Rush Duel.
I love it!

V0903_28_00_04_0.text:
Duel however you like!
That's what makes Rush Duels great!

V0903_28_00_05_0.text:
My strategy was to just have fun.
And it worked!

V0903_28_00_06_0.text: When Dueling the universe, I have to be ready for anything!

V0903_28_00_07_0.text: Yudias, you need to study harder!

V0903_28_00_08_0.text: The Earthdama can't help you if you don't have the skills.

V0903_28_00_09_0.text: Yuhi's never been good at mind games.

V0903_28_00_10_0.text: Remember when we used to practice your lines as kids?

V0903_28_00_11_0.text:
I remember that dialogue!
It's from your breakout role!

V0903_28_00_12_0.text: No one in the universe loves a freebie more than me!

V0903_28_00_12_1.text: So believe me when I say the promo you're running is bogus!

V0903_29_00_00_0.text:
Sigh...
Not a single thing went right.

V0903_29_00_01_0.text: You knew every move I was going to make!

V0903_29_00_03_0.text: I gave it my all, but I still lost...

V0903_29_00_04_0.text:
Sigh...
Your Deck is like a direct counter to mine.

V0903_29_00_05_0.text:
Did you build that Deck yourself, Yudias?
It's awesome!

V0903_29_00_06_0.text: Seems you've finally figured out how that Deck works, Yuhi.

V0903_29_00_07_0.text: You're the greatest actress in the universe, Immi!

V0903_29_00_08_0.text: I didn't understand half of what was going on...

V0903_33_00_00_0.text: I can't have fun unless I give it my all!

V0903_33_00_01_0.text: I'm going full speed from the start!

V0903_30_00_00_0.text: Stop. It's my turn, not yours.

V0903_30_00_01_0.text: Those ATK aren't anything to worry about.

V0903_30_00_02_0.text: I know that's within the rules, but...

V0903_34_00_00_0.text: You have no idea how that card works!

V0903_34_00_01_0.text: Those monsters in defense will be hard to break through.

V0903_34_00_04_0.text:
Collecting isn't a hobby.
It's a way of life!

V0903_34_00_05_0.text: Nothing like finding the final item to get a full set!

V0903_34_00_06_0.text: You can't stop the Redeem Queen from getting what she wants!

V0903_34_00_07_0.text: Every move you make is a clue to what you'll do next.

V0903_34_00_08_0.text: Initiate UTS secret code protocol! UTS lleps retsnom obmoc!

V0903_34_00_09_0.text: You might think you know my Deck, but I changed it up!

V0903_34_00_10_0.text: Hee hee! This is super helpful!

V0903_34_00_12_0.text: There's trillions of aliens out there, but I knew we'd meet.

V0903_35_00_00_0.text: I'm Yuamu Ohdo, President of UTS!

V0903_35_00_01_0.text: I'm Yuamu Ohdo of UTS - the Ultraterrestrial Tracker Squad!

V0903_36_00_01_0.text: It's time to end this Duel!

V0903_36_00_03_0.text: I know this Duel will be in good hands!

V0903_36_00_07_0.text:
Okay, Yuhi.
Show me something good!

V0903_08_00_00_0.text:
Speed up the speed!
Cuz I'm typing up power for my monster!

V0903_08_00_02_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fusionnn!

V0903_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Packet Cylinder!

V0903_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
RB Dragophone!

V0903_08_00_06_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Stealthagic!

V0903_08_00_07_0.text: The Spell Card I'm activating is Royal Rebel's Echo!

V0903_08_00_08_0.text: This is the Trap Card, Dark Revelation!

V0903_08_00_09_0.text: With my Spell Card, Jointech Joint...

V0903_08_00_10_0.text:
Join the cuts and welds!
Join 'em into unbreakable strength!

V0903_08_00_10_1.text: The Equip Spell, Jointech Rush Horn!

V0903_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Pierce!!

V0903_08_00_12_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Barrage of Steel!

V0903_08_00_13_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Tribute Lock!

V0903_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Thunder Spark!

V0903_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Jointech Ignition!

V0903_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Jointech Great Wall!

V0903_08_00_17_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Jointech Bumper!

V0903_08_00_18_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Power Shock!

V0903_09_00_00_0.text:
Mega! Giga! Tera! Peta!
Wipe clean the hard drive!

V0903_09_00_01_0.text: I activate Blue-Fang Burst Dragon's effect!

V0903_09_00_04_1.text: It not only gains ATK, it can also attack twice!

V0903_09_00_05_0.text: Beta Burn Dragon activates its effect!

V0903_09_00_09_0.text: I activate Jointech Burst Dragon's effect!

V0903_09_00_11_0.text: I activate Tamabot Burst Dragon's effect!

V0903_09_00_12_0.text: I activate Jointech Tosceratops's effect and toss a coin!

V0903_40_00_01_0.text:
Aww, it's tails.
This card switches to Defense Position!

V0903_37_00_00_0.text: The data surges wirelessly into an ocean of electrons!

V0903_37_00_01_0.text: Power up your processors and blast across the net!

V0903_37_00_02_0.text: Parse the program and crack the codes!

V0903_13_00_03_0.text: Update to the latest patch and stay on the cutting edge!

V0903_13_00_04_0.text: Clock up both your cores to parallel process with power!

V0903_37_00_04_0.text:
Join with heart!
Join with courage!
Join with endless power!

V0903_37_00_05_0.text: Roar like never before into an ocean of electrons!

V0903_37_00_06_0.text: Join with the heart to brave the battlefield!

V0903_37_00_07_0.text: Though it's small, it combines with the strongest of all!

V0903_37_00_08_0.text:
Join with force and fury!
Join with unstoppable power!

V0903_37_00_09_0.text:
Join with zeal and vigor!
Join the tools of heroic victory!

V0903_37_00_10_0.text: Join infinite strength to stomp the competition!

V0903_37_00_11_0.text: With perfect patience comes the power to pummel!

V0903_13_00_33_0.text: Here's a monster that may be small but gives it its all!

V0903_37_00_12_0.text: Though they're small,  they can control what's tall!

V0903_19_00_00_0.text:
Mega! Giga! Tera! Peta!
Stream the data of destruction!

V0903_27_00_01_0.text: You have to be kidding me...

V0903_27_00_02_0.text: I have to do something... Anything...
